name: Alligator
description: A large reptile known for its long snout and sharp teeth, often found in freshwater habitats.

name: Bear
description: A large, omnivorous mammal with a heavy build and thick fur.

name: Cheetah
description: A fast-running big cat known for its distinctive black spots.

name: Dolphin
description: A highly intelligent marine mammal known for its playful behavior.

name: Elephant
description: A large herbivorous mammal known for its long trunk and tusks.

name: Fox
description: A small to medium-sized carnivorous mammal with a bushy tail.

name: Giraffe
description: A tall herbivorous mammal with a long neck and distinctive spotted coat.

name: Hippopotamus
description: A large, mostly herbivorous mammal known for its large mouth and teeth.

name: Iguana
description: A reptile known for its long tail and often vibrant colors.

name: Jaguar
description: A big cat known for its powerful build and distinctive rosette spots.

name: Kangaroo
description: A marsupial with strong hind legs, known for hopping and carrying young in a pouch.

name: Lion
description: A large carnivorous big cat known for its majestic mane (in males).

name: Moose
description: A large herbivorous mammal with broad, palmate antlers.

name: Nightingale
description: A small, songbird known for its melodious nocturnal singing.

name: Ostrich
description: A large, flightless bird known for its long legs and speed on land.

name: Penguin
description: A flightless bird found in cold regions, known for its waddling gait.

name: Quokka
description: A small marsupial known for its friendly and smiling appearance.

name: Raccoon
description: A medium-sized omnivorous mammal known for its mask-like face.

name: Sloth
description: A slow-moving, arboreal mammal known for its laid-back lifestyle.

name: Tiger
description: A large, carnivorous big cat known for its striking orange coat with black stripes.

name: Uakari
description: A small, red-faced monkey found in South America.

name: Vulture
description: A scavenging bird known for its bald head and powerful beak.

name: Walrus
description: A large marine mammal known for its long tusks and blubber.

name: X-ray Tetra
description: A small, translucent fish known for its see-through appearance.

name: Yak
description: A large, domesticated mammal known for its long, shaggy hair.

name: Zebra
description: A large herbivorous mammal known for its black and white striped coat.
